summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of subscription gating feature completed. All 12 test cases passed. Plan switching works correctly via MongoDB backend, plan badges update in sidebar, locked features show lock icons and toast errors, quick action buttons correctly dim/activate based on plan.

issues: Firestore permission errors appear in console (non-blocking, sync fails silently as expected)

passed_tests: Plan badge in sidebar shows current plan correctly - PASS
Switch to Solo plan via Subscription tab - badge changes to 'Solo' - PASS
Solo: Cash-Flow nav shows lock icon and cursor-not-allowed - PASS
Solo: Eco-scores nav shows lock icon and cursor-not-allowed - PASS
Solo: Click on Cash-Flow nav shows toast error 'Dashboard Cash-Flow disponible dans le pack Croissance' - PASS
Solo: All quick action buttons (e-CMR, GPS, Scan, Portal) appear dimmed (opacity-50) - PASS
Switch to Croissance plan - badge changes to 'Croissance' - PASS
Croissance: Cash-Flow and Eco-scores sidebar items unlocked (no lock icon) - PASS
Croissance: e-CMR and GPS quick action buttons active, Scan and Portal still locked - PASS
Switch to Flotte Pro plan - badge changes to 'Pro' - PASS
Flotte Pro: All sidebar items unlocked, all quick action buttons active - PASS
Subscription page shows current plan correctly with 'Plan actuel' badge - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Firestore sync is non-blocking and fails silently with 'Permission Denied' - this is expected behavior per agent context
Blockchain timestamping is MOCKED with SHA256 hash generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription gating feature fully tested and working. Plan is stored in MongoDB via /api/subscription/update. Key test-ids: plan-badge, nav-cashflow, nav-eco, nav-subscription, select-plan-solo, select-plan-croissance, select-plan-flotte_pro, gated-pdfGeneration, gated-gpsMap, gated-scanBarcode, gated-clientPortal. Firestore sync fails with Permission Denied but is non-blocking.

solo_plan.toast_on_locked_click: Dashboard Cash-Flow disponible dans le pack Croissance
